name: Classic Pumpkin Pie with Candied Pecan Toppin
recipeIngredient: Light brown sugar, firmly packed, 1/2 cup
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Classic Crisco Single Crust and roll out on a lightly floured surface. Press into a 9-inch glass pie plate without baking.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. In a large bowl, combine pumpkin, evaporated milk, eggs, granulated sugar, brown sugar, cinnamon, salt, ginger, nutmeg, and cloves. Mix well until smooth.
4. Pour the mixture into the unbaked pie crust.
5. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 10 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean. Allow to cool completely.
6. For the topping, combine granulated sugar and water in a small saucepan. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the sugar dissolves. Increase the heat and bring to a boil. Boil for 7-8 minutes or until the mixture is light golden brown. Stir in butter and pecan pieces.
7. Pour the topping onto a greased baking sheet and spread it into a thin layer. Allow to cool completely.
8. Break the topping into pieces and sprinkle around the edge of the pie. Store any leftover topping covered in the refrigerator.
